Germick Family Portal
Home

Jalapeno Corn Chowder

author: Janet Caldwell

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield: 4 person

Ingredients

  • 3 cups frozen corn
  • 1 (14.5 oz) can chicken broth
  • 2 cups chopped cooked chicken breast
  • 1 cup milk, half-and-half or light cream
  • 1/4 cup sliced strips bottled roasted red pepper
  • 1-2 fresh jalapeno peppers, finely chppped and seeded
  • 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese
  • 1/4 cup chopped cilantro (opt)

Directions

  1. In a blender or food processor, combine half of the corn and the chicken broth.
  2. Cover and blend or process until nearly smooth. In a large saucepan combine the broth mixture and the remaining corn. (If using fresh corn, simmer covered, 2-3 minutes or until corn is tender.)
  3. Stir in cooked chicken, milk, roasted peppers, and jalapeno peppers; heat through.
  4. Top each serving with cheese and cilantro.
